title: thelypteris mutabilis
intro: Thelypteris mutabilis, also known as the variable fern or the flexible fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris mutabilis include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Thelypteris mutabilis is often prepared in herbal teas or infusions for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of benefits and applications.
